    Adds a new command to the registry.

    Adds a new file to the top of the stack.

    Adds the ID from the specified product to the set of managed IDs.

    Interface for objects that have an automatically generated identifier.

    BaseConsoleClientManager - Class in src.console
    Base console implementation of client managers for both Product and Person objects.

    Removes the specified ID from the set of managed IDs.

    Constructs a RemoveKeyCommand with the specified collection manager.

    Removes all products lower than the default product client manager's product.

    Removes all products lower than the specified product client manager's product.

    Constructs a RemoveLowerCommand with the specified collection manager.
    replaceIfGreater(K) - Method in class src.basecollection.CollectionManager
    Replaces a product if the new product is greater than the existing one, using default client manager.
    replaceIfGreater(K, ProductClientManager) - Method in class src.basecollection.CollectionManager
    Replaces a product if the new product is greater than the existing one.
    ReplaceIfGreaterCommand<K,V> - Class in src.commands
    Command to replace an element by key if the new value is greater than the old one.
